body: import java.nio.charset.IllegalCharsetNameException;

translation: qCodec0 = QCodec(-189081844, " cannot be quoted-printable encoded", charset0)
string0 = qCodec0._encodeText1(" cannot be quoted-printable encoded", "UTF-8")
self.assertEqual("=?UTF-8?Q? cannot be quoted-printable encoded?=", string0)
qCodec0 = QCodec(-189081844, " cannot be quoted-printable encoded", charset0)
assert isinstance(e, DecoderException), "Expected DecoderException, but got {}".format(type(e))
assert str(e) == "RFC 1522 violation: malformed encoded content"
# RFC 1522 violation: charset token not found
assert str(e) == "RFC 1522 violation: charset token not found"
assert str(e) == "RFC 1522 violation: charset not specified"
# RFC 1522 violation: encoding token not found
assert str(e) == "RFC 1522 violation: encoding token not found"
assert str(e) == "RFC 1522 violation: charset token not found"
